expectations.text: Follows a systematic debugging flow (not random guessing)
expectations.evidence: Clear 5-step numbered flow: status → runtime logs → build logs → variables → dashboard
Step 2: RAILWAY_TOKEN=<token> railway logs -n 200 with specific patterns to look for

expectations.text: Checks environment variables as potential cause
expectations.evidence: Step 4: railway variable list with specific vars to check (DATABASE_URL, PORT, API keys)

expectations.text: Mentions Railway-specific causes (PORT, health checks, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Explicitly warns about PORT: 'your app should NOT set this manually; Railway injects it' and mentions health check history
